title: Governor & Lt. Governor
stakes: Sets state rent laws that decide if your landlord can raise rent
Controls MTA funding — directly affects subway fares and service
Signs or vetoes every state law passed in Albany

title: Attorney General
stakes: Sues landlords, banks, and corporations on behalf of New Yorkers
Sets state policy on gun laws, abortion access, and consumer protection

title: State Comptroller
stakes: Manages the state's $270B+ pension fund and decides where it's invested
Audits where your tax dollars actually go

title: State Senator
stakes: Votes on rent regulation, good cause eviction, and tenant protections
Approves the MTA budget that sets your fare
Decides on SUNY/CUNY tuition and student aid

title: State Assembly Member
stakes: Half of every state law starts here — including housing and labor
Sets criminal justice rules: bail, parole, marijuana enforcement
Decides state minimum wage and worker protections

title: U.S. Representative
stakes: Votes on federal student loan policy and Pell Grants
Decides on healthcare, immigration, and abortion law at the federal level
Controls federal funding for NYC housing and transit
